message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor black
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid

participant "" as Start {
}

box "Boundary" #LightBlue
  participant "<<boundary>>\nZMRegistracijskiObrazec" as ZMObr
end box

box "Control" #Gray
  participant "<<control>>\nKrmilnikRegistracija" as KR
end box

box "Entity" #PaleYellow
  participant "<<entity>>\nUporabnik" as Upo
end box

Start -> ZMObr : 
activate ZMObr
deactivate ZMObr

KR -[#white]-> KR : <<create>>
activate KR
note right of KR: KRMILNIK\nREGISTRACIJA
deactivate KR

Upo --[hidden]-- Upo : 

@enduml
